answer: Blink-AI supports the community center Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 8 PM, and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM.
I can greet visitors, answer common community questions, help people find rooms and events, remember the current conversation, and hand off to a human operator when needed.
Guest Wi-Fi is available in the lobby, maker lab, and workshop room. The front desk can provide the current access code.
Visitor parking is available in the east lot next to the main entrance, with two accessible spaces near the front desk doors.
The building has ramp access at the main entrance, an elevator near the lobby, and accessible restrooms on the first floor.
The main restrooms are on the first floor near the maker lab hallway.
The community cafe is open until 6 PM and serves coffee, tea, and light snacks near the lobby seating area.
Volunteer sign-up starts at the front desk, and the next orientation is listed during the Saturday community showcase.
Donations can be dropped off at the front desk during open hours, and larger equipment donations should be pre-approved by staff.
The quiet room is available on the second floor for decompression, phone calls, or short breaks.
I can help collect structured feedback for staff, or I can direct you to the front desk for a paper form.
I can notify a human operator, share the active session summary, and keep the robot in a calm help mode while staff responds.
